Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are many more moviegoers[n]than usual today...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I worked tirelessly attending to[n]the endless flow of customers...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent a long time listening to[n]a film buff talk about movies...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I got all kinds of questions from customers,[n]but I was able to answer all of them...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There were frequent incidents of customers[n]bickering, but I handled them with poise...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I made public announcements about lost[n]items, even though I wasn't used to it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I delivered popcorn to a customer in the[n]middle of a horror movie screening...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks for working through such a tough day. I'll be raising your hourly rate.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I'm getting the hang of things,[n]they're giving me a slight raise...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You're really a one-of-a-kind worker! I hope you continue to stop by and help out![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I've gotten better at my work,[n]they're giving me a slight raise...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Phew, what a day. Here's your paycheck.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I've improved my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}[n]and {f 4 30 2 1 1 0} because of work...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's getting late... I should[n]head back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
